utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Now, check which are present and fully specified in the final package. (1) destination: specified as 'Prague, Czech Republic' – complete. (2) travel_dates: specified as '2024-07-01 to 2024-07-05' – complete. (3) transportation: includes airline name, class, cost, and currency – complete. (4) accommodation: includes property name, type, star rating, guest rating, total cost, and currency – complete. (5) activities: three activities with names, types, individual costs, and currency – complete. (6) additional_services: present but empty – this counts as incomplete because the item should include any extra services with costs (none are given), so not fully specified. (7) total_budget: given as 1700.0 EUR with a cost_breakdown – complete. Therefore, 6 items are fully specified out of 7 total.
